subject: OneDrive sync stuck on 'Processing changes'
description: OneDrive cloud icon shows syncing forever; files not updating for collaborators.

ts_steps.title: Disk space
ts_steps.action: Settings → System → Storage — free several GB on OS drive.

ts_steps.title: Read sync error
ts_steps.action: OneDrive → Settings → sync error codes if shown.

ts_steps.title: Close locking apps
ts_steps.action: Close files open from OneDrive in Office.

ts_steps.title: Path length
ts_steps.action: Rename very long paths or move folder up tree.

ts_steps.title: Unlink PC
ts_steps.action: Settings → Account → Unlink; sign in again.

ts_steps.title: Selective sync
ts_steps.action: Choose folders — avoid syncing entire huge library on laptop.

ts_steps.title: KFM check
ts_steps.action: Backup → Manage Known Folder Move — no double mapping.

internal_information: Locked file, long path, KFM conflict, corrupt cache.
